title: premna microphylla
intro: Premna microphylla, also known as the small-leaf premna or lesser neem, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against infections. Herbal preparations of Premna microphylla can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, although its use should be carefully considered and guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
